sutta: the buddha said monks 3 ideas of a recluse if made to grow made much of complete 7 other conditions what 3 1 i am now come to a state of being an outcast 2 my life is dependent upon others number 3 i must now conduct myself differently these 3 ideas of a recluse if made to grow made much of complete 7 other conditions what 7 1 he is 1 whoever and always makes no pause in action or practice of virtue he does no harm to anyone he is without self-conceit he is eager for the training as regards the necessaries of life he thinks this is my object he dwells arden in energy thus monks these 3 ideas of a recluse if made to grow you've made much of complete these 7 conditions so now that's the end of the suta
commentary:
so here the buddha is saying that a manga should contemplate these 3 important things first that he has come he has now come to the state of being an outcast that means an outcast from society a person who is not somebody in society so he must always remember that because if he remembers that nah then he he will act quite differently number 2 he must remember my life is dependent upon others 3 i must now conduct myself differently now if even understands these 3 things and then he humbles himself he knows that his life is in the hands of lay supporters and then he will behave quite differently so these 7 things the buddha says he will practice number 1 he makes no pause in action here action is satata kari he makes no pause in action i don't know whether that means he's very energetic in striving number 2 he makes he he makes no pause in the practice of virtue in his precepts he he remembers to uphold his precepts number 3 he does no harm to anyone number 4 he is without self-conceit he becomes a humble person number 5 is eager for the training the training is the buddha's training in the noble eightfold path of sila samadhi pannier and number 6 as regards the necessaries of life he thinks this is my object in other words he thinks my object is practicing the holy life as far as the requisites of life and they are not so important whether i get a good rope or i eat good food or i sleep in a very comfortable bed or something not so important number 7 he dwells arden in energy that means he's uh very energetic in cultivating the holy life so these 3 conditions is very good for a monk to remember


===== SOURCE: 096_Anguttara Nikaya Book 10K 10177 - 10213 by Bhante Hye Dhammavuddho Mahathera.txt =====
and we come to the next suta

he does no harm to anyone
